R0238.title: Fake Conversion and Install Farm Fraud
R0238.definition: Fraud operators use device farms and scripts to simulate registrations, installs, retention, and conversions.
keywords: Fake Conversion and Install Farm Fraud
R0238.description: Fraud operators use device farms and scripts to simulate registrations, installs, retention, and conversions.
R0238.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
